Meta.title: SingLab — Karaoke & Singing Practice
Meta.description: Upload a track and practice singing with AI-separated vocal and instrumental layers.

email.tooLong: Email must be at most 255 characters

password.tooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
password.tooLong: Password must be at most 255 characters
password.invalidChars: Password must contain only printable characters (no spaces or control characters)

name.tooShort: Name must be at least 3 characters
name.tooLong: Name must be at most 255 characters

file.invalidType: Unsupported format. Supported: MP3, WAV, OGG, WebM, MP4, MOV, FLAC.
file.sizeTooLarge: File exceeds the maximum size of 100 MB.

songTitle.tooLong: Song title must be 255 characters or less

songAuthor.tooLong: Artist/Author name must be 255 characters or less
